name: College
description:
Ava- She was very close to Jack during preschool and most of high school until he left. She never knew he joined the military, Never even knew Jack was jack until later on. Shes a bit of a bully, Ever since Jack dissapeared she just went on a decline

Sarah- One of Ava’s friends, Shes just nice in general, Shes a brunette and is mainly known as the most genuine person on campus

Helen- Shes a genuine bitch, And shes also one of those pick me girls that thinks she a 10/10 when the cold truth is shes a 5/10 at most People call her the ‘fridge’ of the group since she tries to stop the other girls having a relationship or get hit on.
